allow: Bash(poetry run dbt show --inline "SELECT TOP 1 * FROM Ons_Plan_2.dbo.survey_answers")
Bash(poetry run dbt show --inline "SELECT c.name FROM Ons_Plan_2.sys.columns c JOIN Ons_Plan_2.sys.tables t ON c.object_id = t.object_id WHERE t.name = ''survey_answers'' ORDER BY c.column_id")
Bash(poetry run dbt show --inline "SELECT c.name as kolom FROM Ons_Plan_2.sys.columns c INNER JOIN Ons_Plan_2.sys.tables t ON c.object_id = t.object_id WHERE t.name = ''survey_answers''")

Bash(poetry run dbt show --inline "SELECT c.name as kolom, c.column_id as nr FROM Ons_Plan_2.sys.columns c INNER JOIN Ons_Plan_2.sys.tables t ON c.object_id = t.object_id WHERE t.name = ''survey_answers'' AND c.column_id > 5")
